ORDER ISSUING A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT ALEXANDER I. FISHMAN DEFENDANT ALEXANDER FISHMAN AND EACH OF HIS OFFICERS, AGENTS, EMPLOYEES, REPRESENTATIVES AND ALL PERSONS ACTING IN CONCERT WITH HIM ARE ENJOINED FROM THE FOLLOWING: 1.) DEFENDANT IS PROHIBITED FROM HOLDING HIMSELF OUT AS AN OWNER, AGENT AND MEMBER OF DTA MASTER, LLC; 2.) DEFENDANT IS PROHIBITED FROM ENGAGING IN ANY ACTIVITY THAT VIOLATES THE NON-COMPETITION AND NON-SOLICITATION PROVISIONS IN THE DTA MASTER, LLC OPERATING AGREEMENT AS CONSTRUED APPROPRIATELY UNDER PRINCIPLES OF CONTRACT INTERPRETATION, INCLUDING, WITHOUT LIMITATION, THE PRINCIPLE THAT CONTRACTS SHOULD BE INTERPRETED SO THEY ARE LEGAL, INCLUDING, WITHOUT LIMITATION, COMPLYING WITH CALIFORNIA BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE 16602.5; AND 3.) PLAINTIFF IS TO POST AN ADDITIONAL BOND OF $100,000, FOR A TOTAL OF $300,000. THIS ORDER SHALL TAKE EFFECT UPON POSTING OF THE ADDITIONAL $100,000 BOND. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION TO MODIFY THE INJUNCTION AS MAY BE REQUIRED BY THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-11-2017 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
